name: HappyHorse Studio
description: Bailian-powered unified video studio — HappyHorse 1.0 (t2v / i2v / r2v / video-edit) + Wan 2.6/2.7 + digital-human (photo speak / video relip / video reface / pose drive / avatar compose) + CosyVoice & Edge-TTS + storyboard long-video pipeline. Single backend (Aliyun DashScope), OSS-backed.

description_i18n.zh: 基于阿里云百炼的一体化视频工作室 — HappyHorse 1.0（文生 / 图生 / 参考生 / 视频编辑）+ 万相 2.6/2.7 + 数字人 5 模式 + CosyVoice & Edge-TTS + 长视频分镜拼接，统一 OSS 签名 URL。
description_i18n.en: Bailian-powered unified video studio — HappyHorse 1.0 (t2v / i2v / r2v / video-edit) + Wan 2.6/2.7 + 5 digital-human modes + CosyVoice & Edge-TTS + storyboard long-video pipeline, single DashScope backend with OSS signed URLs.

author: OpenAkita
